findings.description: The source file contains the start of an additional h2 section (reference target `howto_window_scope`, section heading dashes visible) that is entirely absent from the knowledge file. findings.description: Source h2 'URIの指定方法' has >= 2000 chars of plain text and contains 3 h3 subsections (絶対URLによる指定、コンテキストルートからの相対パスによる指定、HTTPとHTTPSの切り替え), but the knowledge file merges all of them into a single section s2 without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings under URIの指定方法: '絶対URLによる指定' (===), 'コンテキストルートからの相対パスによる指定' (===), 'HTTPとHTTPSの切り替え' (===). Combined source content spans multiple code blocks and notes, clearly exceeding 2000 chars.

findings.location: s3 — JSPとActionクラスの間でデータを受け渡す方法
findings.description: Source h2 'JSPとActionクラスの間でデータを受け渡す方法' has >= 2000 chars of plain text and contains 2 h3 subsections (Map型/フォームのプロパティを受け渡す場合、List型/配列の要素のプロパティを受け渡す場合), but the knowledge file merges all of them into a single section s3 without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: 'Map型/フォームのプロパティを受け渡す場合' (===) and 'List型/配列の要素のプロパティを受け渡す場合' (===). Combined content includes 2 Java code blocks and 1 JSP block for Map型, plus 3 Java code blocks and 2 JSP blocks for List型, clearly exceeding 2000 chars.
